info.name: IDFC Integration Platform — edges
info.description: REST entry points for the platform. SFDC assisted channel is SOAP (/outbound-messages); digital partner channel is JSON (/origination); /decisions is the manual C1 push-back. Kafka hops are watched in Kafka UI (http://localhost:8085), not here.

item.name: 1. SFDC push — loan (SOAP golden, Inbound_Wrapper -> loan-origination, APPROVED)

request.description: The assisted channel. 2 notifications -> 2 canonical envelopes on orig.sfdc.pl.v1 -> engine runs loan-origination twice. applicationRef is null on the SOAP path, so both score 780 -> APPROVED. Returns SOAP <Ack>true</Ack>.

body.raw:
<!--
  GOLDEN FIXTURE — real SFDC Outbound Message (SOAP), reconstructed from the actual request.
  Batched: 1..100 <Notification> per envelope. Here 2 notifications to prove un-batching.
  Business payload is JSON-inside-CDATA in <Request__c>. Routing key = <SVCNAME__c>.

  >>> REPLACE the CDATA/ids with the EXACT bytes of your real file for a true byte-level test.
      This reconstruction is faithful to the fields visible in the screenshots.
-->
<soapenv:Envelope
    xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"
    xmlns="http://soap.sforce.com/2005/09/outbound"
    xmlns:sf1="urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com">
  <soapenv:Header/>
  <soapenv:Body>
    <notifications>
      <OrganizationId>00D6D00000020HoUAI</OrganizationId>
      <ActionId>OUTID1240000000000</ActionId>
      <SessionId>SID</SessionId>
      <EnterpriseUrl>EnterpriseUrl</EnterpriseUrl>
      <PartnerUrl>PartnerUrl</PartnerUrl>

      <!-- 1 to 100 repetitions -->
      <Notification>
        <Id>04l6D00000AbCdE0001</Id>
        <sObject>
          <sf1:Id>a0X6D00000Rec0001</sf1:Id>
          <sf1:CLIENTID__c>SFDC</sf1:CLIENTID__c>
          <sf1:CreatedDate>2009-10-14T12:46:36.000Z</sf1:CreatedDate>
          <sf1:LastModifiedDate>2014-10-27T15:14:59.000Z</sf1:LastModifiedDate>
          <sf1:EXECMODE__c>ASYNC</sf1:EXECMODE__c>
          <sf1:Request__c><![CDATA[{"createGenericAccountReq":{"msgHdr":{"hdrFlds":{"timestamp":"2023-10-16T07:25:46.302+05:30","msgId":"00171000002cecnAAA","hdrProp":[{"vl":"10201","nm":"BRANCHID"},{"vl":"777325","nm":"TELLERID"}]},"cnvId":"00171000002cecnAAA","frm":{"id":"BBG"}},"msgBdy":{"subProductType":"1041","relationship":"","rbiClssCtgryDr":350,"rbiClssCtgryCr":180,"rbiClssCdDr":351,"rbiAcctSgmntCd":186,"productType":"2000","nomIntnlty":"IN","nomRequred":"false","nomPinCd":"","nomineeType":"","nomineeState":"","nomineeName":"","nomineeDOB":"","nomineeCity":"","nomineeAddressLine2":"","nomineeAddressLine1":"","nomCntryCd":"","mulOptDepTyp":false,"mopFlds":[{"nm":"SINGLY","flg":"1","dsc":"SINGLY OWNED"},{"nm":"ALL","flg":"","dsc":"NOT REQUIRED"}],"loanNb":"0008405","lgCode":"101010","lcCode":"101010","isMinor":"","intrnNomNum1":"","hmBrnch":"40101","guardianState":"","guardianName":"","guardianCity":"","guardianAddress2":"","guardianAddress1":"","form60Flag":"S","embNm":"","customerId":"9900766374","custLoanNb":"","atmRq":"","atmCrd":"","adtnlId2":"","adtnlId1":"","actn1":"C"}}}]]></sf1:Request__c>
          <sf1:SVCNAME__c>Inbound_Wrapper</sf1:SVCNAME__c>
          <sf1:VERSION__c>1.0</sf1:VERSION__c>
        </sObject>
      </Notification>

      <Notification>
        <Id>04l6D00000AbCdE0002</Id>
        <sObject>
          <sf1:Id>a0X6D00000Rec0002</sf1:Id>
          <sf1:CLIENTID__c>SFDC</sf1:CLIENTID__c>
          <sf1:CreatedDate>2009-10-14T12:46:36.000Z</sf1:CreatedDate>
          <sf1:LastModifiedDate>2014-10-27T15:14:59.000Z</sf1:LastModifiedDate>
          <sf1:EXECMODE__c>ASYNC</sf1:EXECMODE__c>
          <sf1:Request__c><![CDATA[{"createGenericAccountReq":{"msgHdr":{"hdrFlds":{"timestamp":"2023-10-16T07:26:11.114+05:30","msgId":"00171000002cecoBBB","hdrProp":[{"vl":"10201","nm":"BRANCHID"},{"vl":"777325","nm":"TELLERID"}]},"cnvId":"00171000002cecoBBB","frm":{"id":"BBG"}},"msgBdy":{"subProductType":"1041","productType":"2000","nomIntnlty":"IN","nomRequred":"false","mopFlds":[{"nm":"SINGLY","flg":"1","dsc":"SINGLY OWNED"}],"loanNb":"0008406","lgCode":"101010","lcCode":"101010","hmBrnch":"40101","form60Flag":"S","customerId":"9900766375","actn1":"C"}}}]]></sf1:Request__c>
          <sf1:SVCNAME__c>Inbound_Wrapper</sf1:SVCNAME__c>
          <sf1:VERSION__c>1.0</sf1:VERSION__c>
        </sObject>
      </Notification>

    </notifications>
  </soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>

item.name: 2. SFDC push — SENDSMS (SOAP golden -> comm.sms.send.v1, fire-and-forget)

request.description: SVCNAME SENDSMS routes to comm.sms.send.v1 (communications capability, mock sender). No decision; watch the communications logs.

body.raw:
<!--
  GOLDEN FIXTURE #2 — real SFDC Outbound Message (SOAP): an SMS/OTP SEND.
  Same envelope shape as the account-creation message, but a STRUCTURALLY DIFFERENT
  Request__c CDATA: a Salesforce Task sObject (Mobile__c/Description/Type=OTP), NOT
  a createGenericAccountReq. Routing key SVCNAME__c = SENDSMS (a communication
  action, not a business journey). This fixture exists to prove the edge is
  SCHEMA-AGNOSTIC about the CDATA body — it parses the envelope + SVCNAME and
  carries the CDATA forward as an OPAQUE payload; it never assumes the body shape.

  >>> Sandbox values (IDFC CD / cdqa1). REPLACE the ids/CDATA with the EXACT bytes
      of the real file for a true byte-level test. NOTE: the Description carries an
      OTP + mobile + loan number — PII. Fixtures only; production MUST NOT log it.
-->
<soapenv:Envelope
    xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"
    xmlns="http://soap.sforce.com/2005/09/outbound"
    xmlns:sf1="urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com">
  <soapenv:Header/>
  <soapenv:Body>
    <notifications>
      <OrganizationId>00DC40000014dS1MAI</OrganizationId>
      <ActionId>04kC400000008XyZAAU</ActionId>
      <SessionId>SID</SessionId>
      <EnterpriseUrl>https://idfcfirstbank-cd--cdqa1.sandbox.my.salesforce.com/services/Soap/c/58.0/00DC40000014dS1</EnterpriseUrl>
      <PartnerUrl>https://idfcfirstbank-cd--cdqa1.sandbox.my.salesforce.com/services/Soap/u/58.0/00DC40000014dS1</PartnerUrl>

      <Notification>
        <Id>04lC4000000AbCdEAO</Id>
        <sObject xsi:type="sf1:Task" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
          <sf1:Id>00T7F00000ABcdEFGHI</sf1:Id>
          <sf1:CLIENTID__c>SFDC</sf1:CLIENTID__c>
          <sf1:CreatedDate>2026-06-30T09:12:04.000Z</sf1:CreatedDate>
          <sf1:LastModifiedDate>2026-06-30T09:12:04.000Z</sf1:LastModifiedDate>
          <sf1:EXECMODE__c>ASYNC</sf1:EXECMODE__c>
          <sf1:Request__c><![CDATA[{"attributes":{"type":"Task","url":"/services/data/v58.0/sobjects/Task/00T7F00000ABcdEFGHI"},"Id":"00T7F00000ABcdEFGHI","Mobile__c":"9894873985","Description":"731517 is OTP for accessing bureau info for Consumer Durable loan no. 401000034240. Valid for 10 minutes. Do not share. -IDFC FIRST Bank","Type":"OTP","Subject":"SEND OTP","Status":"Open"}]]></sf1:Request__c>
          <sf1:SVCNAME__c>SENDSMS</sf1:SVCNAME__c>
          <sf1:VERSION__c>1.0</sf1:VERSION__c>
        </sObject>
      </Notification>

    </notifications>
  </soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>

request.description: Manual injection of a decision. Fires the SFDC push EXACTLY on the CAS into DECIDED; a second call with the same notificationId returns pushed=false (C1 guard).
JSON channel. type PERSONAL_LOAN -> orig.sfdc.pl.v1 -> loan-origination. APP-HIGH-1 -> CIBIL 780 -> APPROVED + booked (loanId LN-APP-HIGH-1).
'LOW' in applicationRef -> CIBIL 540 -> REJECTED, no booking.

item.name: 6. Digital origination — DUPLICATE resend (same requestId as #4)

request.description: Same requestId as #4 -> ACK_DUPLICATE_REQUEST, nothing re-published (idempotency gate).

item.name: Journey Registry (control plane — designer writes, engine reads)
item.description: The A1 maker-checker API. Every call needs X-Registry-Token; mutations need X-User-Id (the actor). The SERVER enforces maker != checker (403), one editable draft (409), and validation-gated submit (422 with designer-vocabulary issues). Engine-facing reads at the end serve published configs (the A2 seam).

request.description: 201; 409 if the key exists; 422 if the key is not kebab-case.
The server STAMPS journeyKey/version — client-sent identity is overwritten (anti-spoof). 409 when an editable draft already exists.
DRAFT only — published/rejected/pending versions are immutable (409).
422 with issues when the graph fails validation; else -> pendingApproval.
Maker-checker enforced SERVER-SIDE: the author gets 403, always.
A DIFFERENT actor publishes; the pointer moves; the engine refresh picks it up (~30s).
Alternative to 6b — releases the draft slot without moving the published pointer.
activeVersion = the published pointer; version configs via the single-version read.
What the engine bootstraps/refreshes on — the current pointer of every journey.
Historical published versions stay servable — in-flight runs are pinned to these.
